hooks.command:
echo '## CRITICAL CONTEXT (Re-injected after compaction)
- You are assisting the CEO of Bit Foundry AI
- Content pipeline: 5 LinkedIn + 5 Twitter posts daily
- NEVER auto-publish - save as DRAFTS only
- Sub-agents: Krishna (orchestrate) > Agastya (research) > Ved Vyasa (write) > Nakula (review) > Vayu (format) > Sahadeva (publish)
- Quality gate: minimum 8.0/10 score
- 25 agents in ~/.claude/agents/, 53 skills in ~/.claude/skills/
- Memory index at ~/.claude/projects/C--Users-Windows/memory/MEMORY.md'

echo '## Session Context
- Active project: Content pipeline optimization
- Check MEMORY.md for full context
- 25 agents available, 53 skills configured
- Content target: 10 posts/day (5 LinkedIn + 5 Twitter)'
